config.babyzombieaddons.title: BabyzombieAddons Config
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autois.de: When joining SkyBlock, automatically warp to your island or garden.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoisDel: How long to wait before warping after joining a world.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoBackT: What to do after being kicked.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.doubleLob: Auto-confirm the double /lobby prompt outside SkyBlock.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoEngli: Automatically switch chat language to English when joining SkyBlock.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hideBlock: Suppress "There are blocks in the way!" warnings.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.crimsonAr: Mute piston sounds when Crimson armor stacks are full.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.cancelEnd: Prevent accidental ender pearl placement in SkyBlock.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.cakeBuffT: Replace default cake messages with a checklist of consumed cakes.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.quickAuct: Remember previous auction prices and fill them automatically.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hideClose: Hide nearby players within a configurable radius.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.vanquishe: Send coordinates to party chat when a Vanquisher spawns.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.jerryBoxH: Auto-move mouse to correct slot when opening Jerry boxes.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dailyChin: Translate Chinese daily reward messages to English.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.f4CrowdHi: Handle spectator crowd in Floor 4 boss room.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoChest: Automatically close chest GUIs after looting.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dailyCoun: Track daily dungeon runs (1-5 for bonus XP).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueDe: How many seconds to wait before requeuing. 0 = instant.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueMe: Party message sent before requeuing. %delay% = wait time.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueCa: Party message sent when auto requeue is cancelled.
Pipe-separated keywords that cancel auto requeue from party chat.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hpDisplay: Show Kuudra HP on HUD or boss bar.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.phaseTime: Record and display time for each Kuudra phase.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dropshipW: Alert when Dropship is approaching with distance indicator.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.wandering: Title + sound warning during Kuudra P2.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.stunTimer: Countdown timer after pod destruction in Kuudra.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.waypoints: Beacon beams on supply chests, ballista progress, endermites.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.direction: Magma cube icon pointing toward Kuudra in P4.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.enderPear: Auto /gfs ender pearl on instance start or low count.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.perkShopB: Prevent accidental purchase of bad items.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.extremeFo: Alert party if using End Stone Sword near teammates in P4.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.followerH: Calculate today's Kuudra Follower Helmet price.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.noQuestRe: Alert if killing mobs without an active slayer quest.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.pigmanSwo: Sound-based cooldown detection and HUD display.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.reaperArm: Duration and cooldown for Reaper Armor ability.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.endStoneS: Damage resistance duration and double-use prevention.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.bossInfoH: Show boss HP and status for all 6 slayer types.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.bossBound: Colored box with optional beacon beam on boss.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.lowHPBloo: Purple highlight when boss is below 20% HP.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.riftEffig: Show unharmed blood pillars in Stillgore Chateau.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.witherClo: Track Wither Cloak activation, deactivation, and cooldown.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.alignedTi: Show 6-second alignment duration and source player.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.miningAbi: Title/sound alerts when mining abilities are ready or used.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.getFromSa: Auto-extract keys, eggs, and apparatus from sacks.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.armadillo: Show current/max energy with color transition.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.drillSwin: Prevent arm swinging animation while mining.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.powderMin: Remove XP orb sounds and replace chest sounds.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.noPickobu: Prevent Pickobulus explosion on Private Island.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.mineshaft: Corpse and exit waypoints in mineshafts.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.suspiciou: Show suspicious scrap count on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.baseCampQ: Quick warp back to camp from Glacite areas.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.pestDispl: Show beacon beams on garden pests.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.xpOrbSoun: Suppress XP orb sounds when breaking crops.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.signAutoR: Read yaw/pitch from signs and rotate player accordingly.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyAlli: Respond to !allinv in party chat to toggle all-invite.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyInvi: Respond to !p <name> in party chat to invite a player.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyWarp: Respond to !warp in party chat to warp the party.
Delay warp for N seconds with cancel support.
How many seconds to wait before warping.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyJoin: Respond to !join f1/m2/t3 to join dungeon/kuudra instances.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partySend: Respond to !sc in party chat to send your coordinates.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dmPartyIn: Auto-invite players who send you a DM with !p.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupPart: Show a popup when someone invites you to a party.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupGuil: Show a popup for guild-wide party invites.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupFrie: Show a popup when someone sends a friend request.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupDuel: Show a popup when someone invites you to a duel.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupSkyb: Show a popup when someone sends a trade request.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupDung: Show a popup when party leader requests a restart.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.killCombo: Show kill combo count on screen instead of chat.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.betterPer: Skip third-person front view when switching perspective.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dukeWaypo: Mark the Barbarian Duke X location in The Dukedom.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.creeperVi: Reveal invisible creepers in The Mist / Gunpowder Mines.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.fruitDigg: Mark dug fruit locations and nearby treasure at Carnival.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.bazaarSac: Auto-pull items from sacks when creating sell offers.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hideHyper: Hide large explosion particles near necron-blade holders.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.witherImp: Reduce Wither Impact explosion sound volume.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dyedArmor: Prefix dyed armor IDs with DYED_ for texture pack compatibility.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.sackItemH: Show selected sack item quantities on screen.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.periodicE: Remove dead/invalid player entities and invisible armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.stonksPri: Show per-unit price in Stonks Auction GUI.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.bitsShopP: Show coins/bits ratio using NEU price data.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.attribute: Show attribute abbreviations on item icons.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.abiphoneG: Replace /call with a graphical contact list.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.playCmd.d: Replace /play with a game mode selection GUI.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.raredropM: Open the rare drop blacklist and share list manager.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.configBac: Choose between YACL and MoulConfig rendering for the settings GUI.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hudEdit.d: Enter HUD edit mode to drag and resize HUD elements.
playcmd.title: Play
rareropscreen.title: Rare Drop Manager
config.babyzombieaddons.option.debugMode: Enable debug output and extra diagnostic features.
